caption_summary: An older blonde woman carves driftwood in a dim Victorian haunted house, then notices a mysterious shadow, triggering a camera move revealing a creepy corridor.

panels.description: Medium close-up of an older Caucasian woman with short blonde hair intensely carving a piece of driftwood using a sharp chisel. She is seated inside a dimly lit Victorian room with cobwebs hanging around. The lighting is soft and moody, illuminating her focused face and blue eyes looking down at her work.

Close-up of the woman’s face as she abruptly turns her head to the right, her piercing blue eyes sharply shifting focus from the chisel to a mysterious shadowy corner. Her expression is startled, eyebrows raised slightly in surprise. The dim lighting casts dramatic shadows across her face.

Wide shot slowly pushing in on the woman’s startled face while panning right to reveal a long candle-lit corridor with creaking floorboards and peeling wallpaper. The hall is draped in cobwebs and has flickering candlelight creating eerie shadows. The atmosphere is tense and haunted.
